# services.temporal

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.temporal`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.temporal.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Data directory for Temporal. If you change this, you need to manually create the directory. You also need to create the `temporal` user and group, or change [](#opt-services.temporal.user) and [](#opt-services.temporal.group) to existing ones with access to the directory. |
| `services.temporal.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Temporal. |
| `services.temporal.group` | `string` | The group temporal runs as. Should be left at default unless you have very specific needs. |
| `services.temporal.package` | `package` | The Temporal package to use. |
| `services.temporal.restartIfChanged` | `boolean` | Automatically restart the service on config change. This can be set to false to defer restarts on a server or cluster. Please consider the security implications of inadvertently running an older version, and the possibility of unexpected behavior caused by inconsistent versions across a cluster when disabling this option. |
| `services.temporal.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Temporal configuration. See <https://docs.temporal.io/references/configuration> for more information about Temporal configuration options |
| `services.temporal.user` | `string` | The user Temporal runs as. Should be left at default unless you have very specific needs. |
